<?php namespace Illuminate\Queue\Console; use Illuminate\Console\Command; use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\Factory as QueueManager; use Illuminate\Queue\Console\Concerns\ParsesQueue; use Symfony\Component\Console\Attribute\AsCommand; #[AsCommand(name: 'queue:pause')] class PauseCommand extends Command { use ParsesQueue; /** * The console command name. * * @var string */ protected $signature = 'queue:pause {queue : The name of the queue to pause}'; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Pause job processing for a specific queue'; /** * Execute the console command. * * @return int */ public function handle(QueueManager $manager) { [$connection, $queue] = $this->parseQueue($this->argument('queue')); $manager->pause($connection, $queue); $this->components->info("Job processing on queue [{$connection}:{$queue}] has been paused."); return 0; } }
